# Module Dependency Graph

Hexagonal architecture crate dependencies. `ecc-domain` is the pure core with zero I/O; each outer layer depends inward only.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    CLI["ecc-cli<br/>(binary entry point)"]
    APP["ecc-app<br/>(use cases)"]
    INFRA["ecc-infra<br/>(OS adapters)"]
    PORTS["ecc-ports<br/>(trait definitions)"]
    DOMAIN["ecc-domain<br/>(pure business logic)"]
    TEST["ecc-test-support<br/>(test doubles)"]

    CLI --> APP
    CLI --> INFRA
    CLI --> PORTS
    CLI --> DOMAIN

    INFRA --> APP
    INFRA --> PORTS
    INFRA --> DOMAIN

    APP --> PORTS
    APP --> DOMAIN

    PORTS --> DOMAIN

    TEST --> PORTS
    TEST --> DOMAIN

    style DOMAIN fill:#1a1a2e,color:#fff
    style PORTS fill:#16213e,color:#fff
    style APP fill:#0f3460,color:#fff
    style INFRA fill:#533483,color:#fff
    style CLI fill:#e94560,color:#fff
    style TEST fill:#2d4059,color:#fff
```
